compounds.frequency: as needed for injection site pain

benefits.description: Helping with loose skin from weight loss; floppy skin bits starting to shrink
Made real progress against lipodermatosclerosis over two months; almost all wood-like texture of skin gone
Skin all over is now softer and smoother

side_effects.description: Severe burning/sting sensation at injection site; described as murder hornet sting in sensitive individuals; mitigated by adding extra BAC water to dilute, massaging area, or using ice pack
Unable to sleep from giant murder hornet sting after taking full 2 mg dose without proper dilution
Copper content can ramp up if zinc intake is insufficient from daily dosing; copper/zinc balance maintenance required

protocol_notes: User is in rare hyper-sensitive group to copper ions. Uses BAC water and sometimes BPC-157 to mitigate injection site sting. Recommends starting with 250 mcg to gauge reaction. Stacks with collagen peptides (bovine collagen powder), Vitamin C, bio-silica supplements, and red light therapy for enhanced collagen/elastin production (320% improvement per clinical trials). Takes daily zinc picolinate supplement for copper/zinc balance. Also uses GHK-Cu topically mixed with sterile water and hyaluronic acid as a gel. Weight loss reported as 60+ pounds.
